manifest.provisional_timestamp_warning: Stored timestamps are provisional and not confirmed as local window-opening times.
manifest.fitting_method: deterministic bounded one-dimensional search; C_eq solved analytically for each kappa in D1
manifest.convergence_tolerance: 80 ternary-search refinements after logarithmic coarse scan
manifest.minimum_point_rules: D1 requires at least 3 observations; fixed-floor fits require at least 2 observations.
manifest.guardrail: apparent_non_decay_relaxation_rate_h_minus_1 is not ACH or measured air exchange.

definition.note: Provisional stored timestamps; documented ventilation period requires timezone/event-log confirmation.
